name: RecipeRoulette
description: A meal planning and recipe discovery app that provides users with new and exciting meal ideas based on ingredients, dietary preferences, and cooking skills. It offers step-by-step cooking instructions and social features to share recipes.
features: Recipe discovery with filters by ingredient, cuisine, and dietary preference
Meal planning with customizable grocery lists
Step-by-step cooking instructions with photos and videos
Social features to share recipes and cooking experiences
target_audience: Home cooks, foodies, and individuals with dietary restrictions or preferences
